subject: [PATCH 05/24] nfs_common: add new NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds new flags to the NFSv4 protocol, specifically NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis. These flags are added to the GET_DIR_DELEGATION operation and include various notification types such as AUFLAG_VALID, AUFLAG_USER, and CHANGE_AUTH. The changes also update the XDR specification file and the generated code for the nfsd kernel module. This patch is part of a larger series that aims to support new features in NFSv4.1 bis document.
